title: 162: Rivalry week
136: Bracket fun
text:
Load data


Code
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)
options(chromote.headless = "new")

# this data is used in the evidence app, saving as a csv for static generation 
# https://github.com/gallochris/evdev-byc/blob/main/data/college-basketball/wab_logs.R

team_sum_tbl <- readr::read_csv("ncaat_data.csv")

ncaat_teams <- team_sum_tbl |> 
  dplyr::pull(team)

cbbdata::cbd_torvik_game_stats(year = 2025) |> 
  dplyr::filter(team %in% ncaat_teams) |> 
  dplyr::group_by(team) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(
    record = paste0(sum(result == "W"), "-", sum(result == "L")),
    avg = mean(game_score),
    avg_last_10 = mean(head(game_score, 10)),
    sum_data = list(rev(game_score)),
    max_game = max(game_score),
    max_result = result[which.max(game_score)],
    max_opp = opp[which.max(game_score)],
    max_pts_scored =  pts_scored[which.max(game_score)],
    max_pts_allowed =  pts_allowed[which.max(game_score)],
    min_game = min(game_score),
    min_result = result[which.min(game_score)],
    min_opp = opp[which.min(game_score)],
    min_pts_scored =  pts_scored[which.min(game_score)],
    min_pts_allowed =  pts_allowed[which.min(game_score)],
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    max_score = paste0(max_result, ", ", 
                       max_opp, " ",
                       max_pts_scored, "-",
                       max_pts_allowed),
    min_score = paste0(min_result, ", ", 
                       min_opp, " ",
                       min_pts_scored, "-",
                       min_pts_allowed),
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(team, record, avg, avg_last_10, sum_data, max_score, max_game, min_score, min_game,) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(-avg) -> gscores


ncaat_gscores <- gscores |> 
  dplyr::left_join(team_sum_tbl, by = c("team", "record")) |> 
  dplyr::relocate(seed, .before = team) |> 
  dplyr::relocate(region, .after = team) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    region = dplyr::if_else(team == "North Carolina",
                             "South", region),
    seed = dplyr::if_else(team == "North Carolina",
                         11, seed),
    f4 = dplyr::if_else(team == "North Carolina",
                          0.022, f4),
    region = dplyr::if_else(team == "Alabama St.",
                            "South", region),
    seed = dplyr::if_else(team == "Alabama St.",
                          16, seed),
    f4 = dplyr::if_else(team == "Alabama St.",
                        0, f4),
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(avg_rank = rowMeans(dplyr::across(c(trk, kp)))) |> 
  dplyr::select(region,
                seed, 
                team,
                record,
                f4,
                avg, 
                max_score,
                max_game,
                min_score,
                min_game,
                avg_last_10,
                sum_data
                )




Function for Game Scores


Code
region_tbl <- function(region) {
  
  # Set the title of the plot
  table_title <- 
    paste0(region, " Region: Team Performance")
  
  custom_header <-glue::glue(
    "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>{table_title}</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Game Score (GS) is calculated by Bart Torvik on a per game basis.<br>Shows odds to win the region, the season average and average GS over the last 10 games, the best/worst games, and performance over time for every team.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
  )
  
  ncaat_gscores |>
    dplyr::filter(region == {{region}}) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pairs = dplyr::case_when(
        seed %in% c(1, 16) ~ 1,
        seed %in% c(8, 9) ~ 2,
        seed %in% c(5, 12) ~ 3,
        seed %in% c(4, 13) ~ 4,
        seed %in% c(6, 11) ~ 5,
        seed %in% c(3, 14) ~ 6,
        seed %in% c(7, 10) ~ 7,
        seed %in% c(2, 15) ~ 8,
      )
    ) |> 
    dplyr::arrange(pairs, seed) |> 
    cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team, logo_height = 12.5) |> 
    gt::gt() |>
    gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |> 
    gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(team)) |>
    gt::cols_hide(columns = c(region, pairs)) |> 
    gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
      col1 = team,
      col2 = record,
      palette = c("black", "#333333"),
      font_size = c("12px", "8px"),
      font_weight = c("bold", "normal")
    ) |> 
    gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
      col1 = max_game,
      col2 = max_score,
      palette = c("black", "#333333"),
      font_size = c("12px", "6.5px"),
      font_weight = c("bold", "normal")
    ) |>
    gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
      col1 = min_game,
      col2 = min_score,
      palette = c("black", "#333333"),
      font_size = c("12px", "6.5px"),
      font_weight = c("bold", "normal")
    ) |>
    gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
      f4 = list(heading = "Odds", subtitle = "% to win Region"),
      avg = list(heading = "Avg", subtitle = "Season"),
      max_game = list(heading = "Best", subtitle = "Game"),
      min_game = list(heading = "Worst", subtitle = "Game"),
      avg_last_10 = list(heading = "Last 10", subtitle = "Games"),
      heading_color = "black",
      subtitle_color = "gray"
    ) |> 
    gt::tab_spanner(
      columns = c(avg, max_game, min_game, avg_last_10,
                  sum_data),
      label = "Game Score"
    ) |> 
    gt::cols_label(
      seed = "Seed",
      team = ""
    ) |> 
    gt::cols_nanoplot(
      columns = sum_data,
      reference_line = "mean",
      autohide = TRUE,
      new_col_label = "Over time",
      options = gt::nanoplot_options(
        data_area_fill_color = "#a6d96a",
        reference_line_color = "#333333",
        show_data_area = TRUE,
        show_data_points = FALSE
      )
    ) |> 
    gt::cols_align(align = "left", columns = c(team, f4, max_score, min_score)) |>
    gt::cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(seed, avg, avg_last_10)) |>
    gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(f4), sides = "right", color = "black") |> 
    gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
    gt::tab_source_note(source_note = gt::html("<hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your Chart & Ryan at Fifth Factor | data from Bart Torvik and cbbplotR | March 19, 2025</b>")) |> 
    gt::tab_style(
      locations = gt::cells_column_labels(),
      style = gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        weight = "650",
        size = gt::px(14)
      )
    ) |>
    gtUtils::gt_color_pills(f4,
                            domain = c(0, .55), format_type = "percent", digits = 1,
                            palette = c("#d7191c", 
                                        "#ffffbf", 
                                        "#1a9641")
    ) |>
    gtUtils::gt_color_pills(avg,
                            domain = c(10, 100), format_type = "number", digits = 1,
                            palette = c("#d7191c",
                                        "#ffffbf", 
                                        "#1a9641")
    ) |> 
    gtUtils::gt_color_pills(avg_last_10,
                            domain = c(10, 100), format_type = "number", digits = 1,
                            palette = c("#d7191c", 
                                        "#ffffbf", 
                                        "#1a9641")
    ) |> 
    gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc")) |> 
    gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(750)) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      locations = gt::cells_row_groups(),
      style = list(
        gt::cell_text(
          font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
          weight = 850,
          size = gt::px(11.5),
          color = "black",
          align = "left"
        ),
        gt::cell_fill(
          color = "#C5C5FF"
        )
      )
    ) |> 
    gt::tab_style(
      locations = gt::cells_column_spanners(),
      style = gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        weight = 850,
        size = gt::px(14)
      )
    ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
      style = gt::cell_text(
        font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
        size = gt::px(10),
        weight = 250
      )
    ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style = list(
        gt::cell_text(font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
                      size = gt::px(10.5)
        )
      ),
      locations = gt::cells_body(
        rows = gt::everything(),
        columns = gt::everything()
      )
    ) |> 
    gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                            weight = 2,
                            include_labels = FALSE) -> ncaat_region_table
  
  ncaat_region_table
}

Yahoo and Torvik data


Code
bodds <- readr::read_csv("yahoo.csv")

bodds_tbl <- bodds |> 
  dplyr::mutate(f4pick = f4pick * 100, 
                delta = F4 - f4pick) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(-f4pick) |> 
  dplyr::relocate(f4pick) |> 
  dplyr::filter(f4pick > 3) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    F4 = F4/100,
    f4pick = f4pick/100
  ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    color_f4pick = dplyr::case_when(
      f4pick > .25 ~ "orange",
      f4pick <= .25 & f4pick > F4 ~ "yellow",
      f4pick <= .25 & f4pick <= F4 ~ "lightgreen"
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(F4, Team, Seed, Region, 
                f4pick, color_f4pick)


bodds_tbl |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(Team, Team,
                         logo_height = 15) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(-F4, -f4pick) |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gt::cols_hide(color_f4pick) |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = Team) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::cols_align(align = "left", columns = c("Team", "Region")) |> 
  gt::cols_align(align = "right", columns = c("F4", "Seed", 
                                              "f4pick")) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_color_pills(
    F4,
    domain = c(0, .7),
    format_type = "percent",
    digits = 1,
    palette = c("#8B0000", "#FF0000", "#FF4500", "#ADFF2F", "#008000"),
    pill_height = 15,
  ) |> 
  gt::fmt_percent(f4pick, decimals = 1) |> 
  gt::data_color(
    columns = f4pick,
    fn = function(x) {
      dplyr::case_when(
        x > 0.25 ~ "orange",
        x <= 0.25 & x > bodds_tbl$F4[match(x, bodds_tbl$f4pick)] ~ "yellow",
        x <= 0.25 & x <= bodds_tbl$F4[match(x, bodds_tbl$f4pick)] ~ "lightgreen",
        TRUE ~ "black"
      )
    },
    alpha = 0.6
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_label(
    F4 = "Odds", 
    Team = "",
    Seed = "Seed", 
    Region = "Region", 
    f4pick = "Pick %", 
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(
    title = gt::md("**Final Four Odds vs Yahoo Bracket Picks**"),
    subtitle = "Shows Final Four odds from Bart Torvik compared to Yahoo bracket picks by the public for the 2025 NCAA men's basketball tournament."
  ) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = gt::html(
      "<hr>Data through March 18, 2025 games<hr><br><b>Table by Ryan at Fifth Factor and Chris at Bless your chart <br> data via barttorvik.com, yahoo.com, + cbbplotR</b>"
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#EEEEEE',
    table.font.size = gt::px(12),
    column_labels.text_transform = 'uppercase'
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_column_labels(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      weight = 850,
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(385)) -> f4_tbl 


gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  f4_tbl,
  file = "f4_tbl.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "white"
)

title: 138: Trends
text:
Load data


Code
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

# manually add in other numbers from sports-refernece and wikipedia 

acct <- c(1981, 1982, 1989, 1991, 1994, 1997, 1998, 2007, 2008, 2016)

rs <- c(1982, 1983, 1984, 1985, 1987, 1988, 1993, 1995, 2001, 2005, 
        2007, 2008, 2009, 2011, 2012, 2016, 2017, 2019, 2024)

f4 <- c(1981, 1982, 1991, 1993, 1995, 1997, 1998, 2000, 2005, 2008, 2009, 2016, 2017, 2022)

titles <- c(1982, 1993, 2005, 2009, 2017)

nba <- c(1980, 1981, 1982, 1984, 1984, 1986, 1987, 1987, 1989, 1991, 1991,
         1992, 1993, 1994, 1995, 1995, 1998, 1998, 2001, 2001, 2005, 2005,
         2005, 2005, 2007, 2009, 2009, 2009, 2010, 2012, 2012, 2012, 2012, 
         2013, 2014, 2016, 2017, 2017, 2019, 2019, 2019, 2020, 2021)
         
# function to count by decade 
convert_to_decade <- function(years) {
  paste0(floor(years / 10) * 10, "s")
}

decade_counts <- data.frame(
  Decade = unique(c(convert_to_decade(acct), convert_to_decade(rs), convert_to_decade(f4), convert_to_decade(titles)))
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    ACCT = sapply(Decade, function(d) sum(convert_to_decade(acct) == d)),
    RS = sapply(Decade, function(d) sum(convert_to_decade(rs) == d)),
    F4 = sapply(Decade, function(d) sum(convert_to_decade(f4) == d)),
    Titles = sapply(Decade, function(d) sum(convert_to_decade(titles) == d)),
    NBA = sapply(Decade, function(d) sum(convert_to_decade(nba) == d)),
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Decade)

# summarize the data
unc_summary <- unc |>
  dplyr::filter(Year > 1979) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    Decade = paste0(floor(Year / 10) * 10, "s")  # Convert Year to decade format
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Decade) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    Total_Wins = sum(W...6, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Losses = sum(L, na.rm = TRUE),
    Win_Percentage = Total_Wins / (Total_Wins + Total_Losses)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Decade)

# summarize the win percentages in a list 
unc_with_decade <- unc |>
  dplyr::filter(Year > 1979) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    Decade = paste0(floor(Year / 10) * 10, "s")  # Convert Year to decade format
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Decade) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    Yearly_Win_Pcts = list(rev(winpct))  # Store win percentages as a list per decade
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Decade)

# all the tables 
unc_hist <- unc_summary |> 
  dplyr::left_join(decade_counts, by = "Decade") |> 
  dplyr::left_join(unc_with_decade, by = "Decade")

title: 100: 2024 ACC Football

Load and manipulate data


Code
library(cbbplotR)
cfb_2024_sched <- readr::read_csv("2024_sched_win_totals.csv") 

# find ACC only games plus Notre Dame 
acc_only <- cfb_2024_sched |>
  dplyr::filter(conference == "ACC" & conference_game == TRUE)  |>
  dplyr::mutate(game_played = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::select(-color)

# grab only the acc teams 
acc_teams <- unique(acc_only$team_name)

# find the notre dame opponents
nd <- cfb_2024_sched |> 
  dplyr::filter(team_name == "Notre Dame") |> 
  dplyr::filter(opponent %in% acc_teams) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(game_played = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(home_away = ifelse(home_away == "neutral" &  # ATL is not
                                     opponent == "Georgia Tech", # neutral 
                                   "away", home_away)) |> 
  dplyr::select(-color)

# find the teams playing notre dame 
teams_vs_nd <- cfb_2024_sched |> 
  dplyr::filter(team_name %in% acc_teams) |> 
  dplyr::filter(opponent == "Notre Dame") |> 
  dplyr::mutate(game_played = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(home_away = ifelse(home_away == "neutral" &  # ATL is not
                                     team_name == "Georgia Tech", # neutral 
                                   "home", home_away)) |> 
  dplyr::select(-color)


acc_plus_nd <- acc_only |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows(nd) |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows(teams_vs_nd) |> 
  dplyr::select(-1) |>  # remove first row
  dplyr::mutate(
    strength = win_total / max(win_total) # relative opponent strength
  )

conf_sos <- acc_plus_nd |>
  dplyr::group_by(team_name) |>                # Group by each team
  dplyr::mutate(sos = mean(
    dplyr::case_when(
      home_away == "home" ~ strength * 0.9,
      # Home games
      home_away == "away" ~ strength * 1.1,
      # Away games (more difficult)
      home_away == "neutral" ~ strength * 1    # Neutral games (no change)
    ),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

# acc teams plus ND 
acc_teams_with_nd <- c(acc_teams, "Notre Dame")

# find the teams that are NOT opponents including ND
avoid_opp <- acc_plus_nd |>
  dplyr::group_by(team_name) |>
  dplyr::summarise(not_opp = list(setdiff(acc_teams_with_nd, c(opponent, team_name)))) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()


not_opponents_expanded <- avoid_opp |>
  tidyr::unnest(not_opp) |>
  dplyr::rename(not_opp_team = not_opp)

not_opp_with_sos <- not_opponents_expanded |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    conf_sos |>
      dplyr::select(team_name, team_total),
    by = c("not_opp_team" = "team_name"),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )


delta_sos <- conf_sos |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    not_opp_with_sos |>
      dplyr::group_by(team_name) |>
      dplyr::summarise(
        not_opp_sos = mean(team_total, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = 'drop'
      ),
    by = "team_name"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(sos_delta = not_opp_sos - sos)




Base GT table


Code
acc_sched <- conf_sos |>
  dplyr::select(team_name, team_total, sos, opponent, game_played) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = opponent,
                     values_from = game_played,
                     values_fill = FALSE)


acc_wide_sched <- acc_sched |>
  dplyr::arrange(-sos)

# Step 3: Reorder columns alphabetically
opponent_columns <- colnames(acc_wide_sched)[!(colnames(acc_wide_sched) %in%
                                                 c("team_name", "team_total", "sos"))]

sorted_columns <- c("team_name", "team_total", "sos", sort(opponent_columns))

acc_match_sched <- acc_wide_sched |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(sorted_columns))

# headers

add_team_header <- function(team_name, img_url) {
  gtExtras::img_header(
    label = "",
    img_url = img_url,
    height = 20,
    palette = c("white")
  )
}

team_headers_with_images <- purrr::map2(team_headers, team_img_urls, add_team_header) |> purrr::set_names(team_headers)

# gt
acc_match_sched |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team_name, team_name, include_name = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(sos = round(sos, 2)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(-sos) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(team_name)) |>
  gt::cols_align(align = "left", columns = 1) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team_name = "",
    team_total = gt::html("Win<br>Total"),
    sos = gt::html("SOS<br>ACC Only"),!!!team_headers_with_images
  ) |>
    gt::cols_align(align = "center", columns = 3) |>
  gt::fmt_tf(
    columns = -c(team_name, -team_total, sos),
    tf_style = "circles",
    colors = c("#252525", "lightgray")
  )  |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(
    columns = c(team_name, team_total, sos),
    sides = "left",
    color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(
    columns = -c(team_name, team_total),
    sides = "right",
    color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2, 7, 18),
    fill = "#FFFEE0",
    columns = c(team_name)
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(17),
    fill = "navy",
    columns = c(team_name),
    alpha = 0.2
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style_body(
    columns = -c(1:2),
    style = gt::cell_fill(color = "#cccccc"),
    fn = function(x)
      x > 0
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_hulk_col_numeric(columns = c(team_total)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_hulk_col_numeric(columns = c(sos), reverse = TRUE) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("top"),
      color = 'black',
      weight = gt::px(1.5),
      style = 'solid'
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = gt::everything())
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options(heading.align = "left") |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups(groups = gt::everything()),
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(align = "center"),
      gt::cell_borders(
        sides = c("all"),
        color = "black",
        weight = gt::px(2)
      )
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = 'white',
    table.font.size = gt::px(12),
    column_labels.text_transform = 'uppercase',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold'
  ) -> acc_tbl

title: 152: UNC bad home losses
text:
Load data


Code
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

# gt save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) %>%
    magick::image_trim() %>%
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) %>%
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}
###

unc_bad <- readr::read_csv("unc_home.csv") |> 
  dplyr::filter(diff > 29) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(score = paste0(awayTeam, ", ", 
                               awayPoints, "-", homePoints)) |> 
  dplyr::select(diff, score, season) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    final_rec = dplyr::case_match(season, 
        2025 ~ "0-1 (?)",
        2002 ~ "3-9",
        1988 ~ "1-10",
        1989 ~ "1-10",
        2003 ~ "2-10",
        2004 ~ "6-6",
        1999 ~ "3-8",
        2008 ~ "8-5",
        2016 ~ "8-5"
        )
  )




Home loss table


Code
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/153.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>North Carolina worst home losses since 1980</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows the worst losses at home by point differential since 1980.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

unc_tbl <- unc_bad |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
        diff = as.numeric(paste0("-", diff
        ))
    ) |> 
  gt::gt() |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |>
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    diff = list(heading = "+/-", subtitle = "Margin"),
    score = list(heading = "Result", subtitle = "Opponent"),
    season = list(heading = "Season", subtitle = "Since 1980"),
    final_rec = list(heading = "W-L", subtitle = "Final Season Record"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data via collegefootballdata.com, theme via {gtUtils} and logo from ESPN.<hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your Chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#56a0d3", "#89BDE0", "#BBD9ED")) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(500)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 1,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(11.5),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_text(font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"))),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = everything())
  ) |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(diff, season), align = "right") |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(score, final_rec), align = "left") |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(rows = c(6), fill = "#ffe9ec")


gt_save_crop(unc_tbl,
                      file = "bad_unc.png",
                      whitespace = 60,
                      bg = "#FFFDF5")

title: 101: Power conference win totals
text:
Load data


Code
library(cbbplotR)
cfb_2024_sched <- readr::read_csv("2024_sched_win_totals.csv") 


# check by conferences 
confs_only <- cfbfastR::cfbd_team_info(year = 2024) |>
dplyr::select(opponent = school, opp_conf = conference)

cfb_by_conf <- cfb_2024_sched |>
dplyr::full_join(confs_only, by = "opponent")


p4_nd <- c("ACC", "SEC",
        "Big 12", "Big Ten", "ND")

cfb_by_conf |> 
    dplyr::mutate(opp_conf = dplyr::if_else(opponent == "Notre Dame", "ND", opp_conf)) |> 
    dplyr::filter(opp_conf %in% p4_nd) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(conference) |> 
    dplyr::summarise(
        teams = dplyr::n_distinct(team_name),
        sec_count = sum(opp_conf == "SEC"),
        acc_count = sum(opp_conf == "ACC"),
        big_12_count = sum(opp_conf == "Big 12"),
        big_ten_count = sum(opp_conf == "Big Ten"),
        nd_count = sum(opp_conf == "ND")
    ) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
        other_conf_count = sum(c(
            sec_count * (conference != "SEC"),
            acc_count * (conference != "ACC"),
            big_12_count * (conference != "Big 12"),
            big_ten_count * (conference != "Big Ten"),
            nd_count * (conference != "ND")
        )),
        per_team = other_conf_count/teams
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() -> tray_conf

# playoff odds 
podds <- tibble::tribble(
  ~team, ~odds, ~win_total,~conf,
  "Ohio State",-650,10.5,"Big Ten",
  "Georgia",-600,10.5,"SEC",
  "Oregon",-290,10.5,"Big Ten",
  "Texas",-230,10.5,"SEC",
  "Notre Dame",-170,10.5,"Independent",
  "Penn State",-145,9.5,"Big Ten",
  "Ole Miss",-125,9.5,"SEC",
  "Alabama",+100,9.5,"SEC",
  "Michigan",+110,8.5,"Big Ten",
  "LSU",+125,9.5,"SEC",
  "Florida State",+160,9.5,"ACC",
  "Tennessee",+170,8.5,"SEC",
  "Missouri",180,9.5,"SEC",
  "Clemson",200,9.5,"ACC",
  "Miami",210,9.5,"ACC",
  "Texas A&M",240,8.5,"SEC",
  "Utah",260,9.5,"Big 12",
  "Kansas State",310,9.5,"Big 12"
) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(prob = dplyr::if_else(odds > 0,
                              100 / (odds + 100),
                              -odds / (-odds + 100)),
                ) 




Boxplot


Code
cfb_2024_sched |> 
  dplyr::filter(conference %in% c("ACC", "SEC", "Big 12", "Big Ten")) |> 
  dplyr::distinct(team_name, .keep_all = TRUE) |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = conference, y = team_total, group = conference)) + 
  ggplot2::geom_boxplot(
    outliers = FALSE,
    color = "#474747", 
    fill = "transparent", 
    stat = "boxplot"
  ) +
  ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x = cfbplotR::element_cfb_logo(size = 1.25), 
    axis.text.x.top = cfbplotR::element_cfb_logo(size = 1.25),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(
    position = "top", # Add x-axis to the top
    labels = c("ACC", "Big 12", "Big Ten", "SEC")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "2024 College Football: Preseason Win Totals for 'Power' Conferences",
                    subtitle = "Shows the range of preseason win totals for teams in the ACC, Big 12, Big Ten, and SEC.  \nTeams with the highest (9.5 and up) and lowest (4.5 and below) win totals in each league are highlighted.",
                    caption = "Data via FanDuel + cfbfastR + cfbplotR | July 24, 2024  \nPlot by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) | Bless your chart",
                    x = "", 
                    y = "Win Totals") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 10.5, 3.5),
    labels = c(0, 3.5, 7.0, 10.5)
  ) -> base_plot

Code
podds |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team) |>
  dplyr::mutate(sentence = paste0(conf, " | Win Total: ", win_total)) |>
  dplyr::select(team, sentence, odds, prob) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = team,
    col2 = sentence,
    palette = c("black", "black"),
    font_weight = c("normal", "bold")
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
    sentence = "",

    prob = "% Chance"
  ) |>

  gt::cols_align(align = "left", columns = c(team)) |>
  gt::data_color(
    columns = odds,
    direction = c("column"),
    method = c("numeric"),
    palette = c("Greens"),
    reverse = TRUE
  ) |>
  gt::data_color(
    columns = prob,

    method = c("numeric"),
    palette = c("Greens")
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_percent(columns = c(prob), decimals = 1) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(team),
                           sides = "right",
                           color = "black") |>
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "2024 College Football: Preseason Win Totals and Odds to Make College Football Playoff",
    subtitle = gt::html(

title: 106: Another drive chart
text:
Build drive chart using Stat Broadcast


Code
library(cbbplotR)
usc_lsu<- readr::read_csv("usc_lsu.csv", col_types = readr::cols(time_min_a = readr::col_character(), 
                                                   time_sec_a = readr::col_character(),
                                                   time_min_b = readr::col_character(), 
                                                   time_sec_b = readr::col_character()
                                                   )
)
                       

drives <- usc_lsu |> 
  dplyr::mutate(time_sec_a = dplyr::if_else(nchar(time_sec_a) == 1, 
                                                  stringr::str_pad(time_sec_a, width = 2, pad = "0"), 
                                                  time_sec_a),
                time_sec_b = dplyr::if_else(nchar(time_sec_b) == 1, 
                                            stringr::str_pad(time_sec_b, width = 2, pad = "0"), 
                                            time_sec_b),
                ) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.character), ~tidyr::replace_na(., "")),
                dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~tidyr::replace_na(., 0))
  ) 




GT Table for drives


Code
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/99.png'
       style='height: 55px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
       <span style='display: block; text-align: left; font-size: 14px;'>
       <br>
       <b>Total drives</b>: 10<br>
       <b>Scoring drives</b>: 4<br>
       <b>Avg. start</b>: Own 25
       </span>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>USC 27, LSU 20</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Drive chart showing each team's possessions.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/30.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
              <span style='display: block;  text-align: left; font-size: 14px;'>
              <br>
       <b>Total drives</b>: 11<br>
       <b>Scoring drives</b>: 5<br>
       <b>Avg. start</b>: Own 28
       </span>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)


new_drives <- drives |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    team_a = dplyr::if_else(team_a == "", "Duke", team_a),
    team_b = dplyr::if_else(team_b == "", "Duke", team_b)
  ) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team_a, team_a, include_name = FALSE) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team_b, team_b, include_name = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    sen_a = paste0(desc_a, "<br>", time_min_a, ":", time_sec_a),
    sen_b = paste0(desc_b, "<br>", time_min_b, ":", time_sec_b),
    sen_a = dplyr::if_else(sen_a == "<br>:", "", sen_a),
    sen_b = dplyr::if_else(sen_b == "<br>:", "", sen_b),
    team_a = # fix the logo to be for COVID
      dplyr::if_else(
        team_a == "<img src='http://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/150.png' style='height: 25px; width: auto; vertical-align: -30%;'> ",
        "<img src='https://i.imgur.com/qFmcbT0.png' style='height: 25px; width: auto; vertical-align: -30%;'> ",
        team_a
      ),
    team_b =
      dplyr::if_else(
        team_b == "<img src='http://a.espncdn.com/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/150.png' style='height: 25px; width: auto; vertical-align: -30%;'> ",
        "<img src='https://i.imgur.com/qFmcbT0.png' style='height: 25px; width: auto; vertical-align: -30%;'> ",
        team_b
      )
  )

lsu_usc_drive_chart <- new_drives |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(team_a, team_b)) |>
  gt::cols_hide(columns = c(time_min_a, time_sec_a, desc_a, desc_b, time_min_b, time_sec_b)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = team_a,
    col2 = sen_a,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = team_b,
    col2 = sen_b,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = result_b,
    col2 = points_b,
    palette = c("black", "#333333"),
    font_size = c("12px", "10px"),
    small_cap = FALSE
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = result_a,
    col2 = points_a,
    palette = c("black", "#333333"),
    font_size = c("12px", "10px"),
    small_cap = FALSE
  ) |>
  gt::cols_align(align = "left",
                 columns = c(team_a, team_b, result_a, result_b)) |>
  gt::fmt_tf(
    columns = -c(team_a, sen_a, team_b, sen_b, result_a, result_b),
    tf_style = "circles",
    colors = c("green", "red"),
    na_val = ""
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team_a = "",
    result_a = "",
    zero_a = "0",
    five_a = "",
    ten_a = "10",
    fifteen_a = "",
    twenty_a = "20",
    twentyfive_a = "",
    thirty_a = "30",
    thirtyfive_a = "",
    forty_a = "40",
    fortyfive_a = "",
    fifty = "50",
    fortyfive_b = "",
    forty_b = "40",
    thirtyfive_b = "",
    thirty_b = "30",
    twentyfive_b = "",
    twenty_b = "20",
    fifteen_b = "",
    ten_b = "10",
    five_b = "",
    zero_b = "0",
    result_b = "",
    team_b = ""
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(
    columns = c(result_b, fifty),
    sides = "right",
    color = "black",
    weight = gt::px(.5)
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(
    columns = c(result_a, fifty),
    sides = "left",
    color = "black",
    weight = gt::px(.5)
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(5, 7, 12, 18),
    fill = "#C7BBD7",
    columns = c(29)
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(4, 6, 11, 17, 19),
    fill = "#E0B2B2",
    columns = c(6)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = gt::html(
      "
                                       Data from StatBroadcast | Theme from gtExtras and logos from ESPN.com<br>
                                       Green dots indicate the start of a drive.<br>
                                       Arrows indicate the length of the drive.<br>
                                       Red dots indicate end of drive.<br>
                                       <hr>
                                       <b>Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart | September 3, 2024</b>"
    )
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#ffffff',
    column_labels.font.size = gt::px(14),
    column_labels.text_transform = 'uppercase'
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(style = list(gt::cell_borders(
    sides = c("left", "right"),
    color = "black",
    weight = gt::px(2)
  )),
  locations = list(gt::cells_body(columns = gt::everything()))) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "bottom"),
      color = 'black',
      weight = gt::px(1.5),
      style = 'solid'
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = gt::everything())
  )

gtExtras::gtsave_extra(
  lsu_usc_drive_chart,
  filename = "usc_lsu_drives.png",
  vwidth = 850,
  expand = 10
)

Data from StatBroadcast | Theme from gtExtras and logos from ESPN.com
Green dots indicate the start of a drive.
Arrows indicate the length of the drive.
Red dots indicate end of drive.


Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart | September 3, 2024










Grab FBS vs FBS data


Code
home_games <- cfbfastR::cfbd_game_info(year = 2024, week = 1) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(result = dplyr::if_else(home_points > away_points, "W", "L")) |> 
  dplyr::rename(team = home_team, opp = away_team, 
                conf = home_conference, opp_conf = away_conference,
                team_points = home_points, opp_points = away_points) |>
  dplyr::select(game_id, week, team, opp, conf, opp_conf, result)
  

away_games <- cfbfastR::cfbd_game_info(year = 2024, week = 1) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(result = dplyr::if_else(away_points > home_points, "W", "L")) |> 
  dplyr::rename(team = away_team, opp = home_team, 
                conf = away_conference, opp_conf = home_conference) |>
  dplyr::select(game_id, week, team, opp, conf, opp_conf, result)


game_summary <- home_games |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows(away_games) |> 
  dplyr::filter(conf != opp_conf) |>
  dplyr::group_by(conf, opp_conf) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    games = dplyr::n(),
    wins = sum(result == "W"),
    losses = sum(result == "L")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(result = paste0(wins, "-", losses))



game_summary |> 
  dplyr::filter(!conf %in% c("Big South-OVC", "CAA", 
                             "MEAC", "MVFC", "Patriot", 
                             "NEC", "Southern", "FCS Independents",
                             "Southland", "SWAC", "UAC")) |> 
  dplyr::filter(!opp_conf %in% c("Big South-OVC", "CAA", 
                             "MEAC", "MVFC", "Patriot", 
                             "NEC", "Southern",  "FCS Independents",
                             "Southland", "SWAC", "UAC")) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(conf = dplyr::case_match(conf,
                                         "American Athletic" ~ "American",
                                         "Pac-12" ~ "Pac-2",
                                         "Conference USA" ~ "CUSA",
                                         "FBS Independents" ~ "INDIE",
                                         "Mid-American" ~ "MAC",
                                         "Mountain West" ~ "MW",
                                         conf ~ conf  )) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(opp_conf = dplyr::case_match(opp_conf,
                                             "American Athletic" ~ "American",
                                             "Pac-12" ~ "Pac-2",
                                             "Conference USA" ~ "CUSA",
                                             "FBS Independents" ~ "INDIE",
                                             "Mid-American" ~ "MAC",
                                             "Mountain West" ~ "MW",
                                             opp_conf ~ opp_conf  )) |> 
  dplyr::select(conf, opp_conf, result) |> 
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = opp_conf,
    values_from = result,
    values_fill = "0-0"
  )  |> 
  dplyr::filter(conf != "Big Sky") |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(`Big Sky`)) |>  # remove big sky to keep Pac2 alive 
  dplyr::ungroup() -> conferences

# build the matrix and make order updates
conf_matrix <- as.matrix(conferences[, -1])
rownames(conf_matrix) <- conferences$conf

# this is only for non-conference, so replace with "-" when ACC vs ACC, etc. 
for (i in 1:nrow(conf_matrix)) {
  if (rownames(conf_matrix)[i] %in% colnames(conf_matrix)) {
    conf_matrix[i, rownames(conf_matrix)[i]] <- "-"
  }
}

conf_matrix_alpha <- conf_matrix[, sort(colnames(conf_matrix))]

conferences_alpha <- data.frame(conf = rownames(conf_matrix_alpha), conf_matrix_alpha, check.names = FALSE)

# reset row names
rownames(conferences_alpha) <- NULL

conferences <- conferences_alpha




GT table for FBS vs FBS


Code
conferences |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |> 
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#EEEEEE',
    table.font.size = gt::px(14),
    column_labels.text_transform = 'uppercase'
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(style = list(gt::cell_borders(
    sides = c("left"),
    color = "#eeeeee",
    weight = gt::px(2)
  )),
  locations = list(gt::cells_body(
    columns = gt::everything()
  ))) |> 
  gt::cols_label(
    conf = ""
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html("<b>Head-to-Head Records Between FBS Conferences through September 3, 2024</b><hr>")) |> 
  gt::tab_source_note(source_note = gt::html("Data via cfbfastR through September 2, 2024 | Highlights the games between the 'Power 4'<br>
  This only includes the <b>results</b> in individual games non-conference games against FBS opponents. It doesn't factor in location, opponent strength, or any other power/metric ratings.<br>
  <hr>
                                       <b>Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart | September 3, 2024</b>")) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(rows = c(1, 3, 4, 10), fill = "#FFFEE0", 
                              columns = c(2,4,5,11)) -> conf_tbl 

gtExtras::gtsave_extra(conf_tbl, 
                       filename = "conf_week_1_tbl.png",
                       vwidth = 650,
                       expand = 10)

title: 108: Delta pace of play
text:
Fetch and scrape data


Code
library(cbbplotR)
library(rlang)

url <- "https://www.teamrankings.com/college-football/stat/seconds-per-play?date=2024-09-18"

webpage <- rvest::read_html(url)


pace <- webpage |>
  rvest::html_node("table") |>
  rvest::html_table() |>
  dplyr::mutate(diff = `2023` - `2024`) |>
  dplyr::select(Team, `2024`, `2023`, diff)


slow_pace <- pace |>
  dplyr::arrange(diff) |>
  dplyr::slice(1:10) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Team = dplyr::case_match(
      Team,
      "W Michigan" ~ "Western Michigan",
      "N Carolina" ~ "North Carolina",
      "Middle Tenn" ~ "Middle Tennessee State",
      "Colorado St" ~ "Colorado State",
      Team ~ Team
    )
  ) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(Team, Team) |>
  dplyr::mutate(category = "Slower")

fast_pace <- pace |>
  dplyr::arrange(-diff) |>
  dplyr::slice(1:10) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Team = dplyr::case_match(
      Team,
      "Miss State" ~ "Mississippi State",
      "San Diego St" ~ "San Diego State",
      "TX El Paso" ~ "UTEP",
      "San Jose St" ~ "San Jose State",
      "E Carolina" ~ "ECU",
      Team ~ Team
    )
  ) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(Team, Team) |>
  dplyr::mutate(category = "Faster")

all_pace_teams <- fast_pace |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(slow_pace)




GT Table for pace differences


Code
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://img.pikbest.com/png-images/qiantu/cartoon-small-alarm-clock-png-download_2689861.png'
       style='height: 65px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>College football<br> Teams playing <em>faster</em> and <em>slower</em></span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows the ten fastest and slowest teams compared to seconds per play on offense from last season to this season.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

delta_tbl <-  all_pace_teams |>
  dplyr::select(Team, `2024`, diff, `2023`, category) |>
  dplyr::group_by(category) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = c(`2024`, `2023`, diff), decimals = 1) |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(Team) |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(-Team), "center") |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(Team), "left") |>
  gt::tab_options(column_labels.border.top.style = "none") |>
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    `2024` = list(heading = "2024", subtitle = "Season"),
    `2023` = list(heading = "2023", subtitle = "Season"),
    diff = list(heading = "+/-", subtitle = "Change"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(Team = "") |>
  gtExtras::gt_hulk_col_numeric(columns = c(diff), domain = c(-10, 10)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_538_caption(
    "<hr>Data via TeamRankings, theme via {gtUtils}, and logos from ESPN.com. <br>2024 season data through September 14 games.",
    "Table by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) + Bless your chart"
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(550)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 1,
                          include_labels = FALSE)


gtUtils::gt_save_crop(delta_tbl,
                      file = "delta_tbl.png",
                      whitespace = 40,
                      bg = "white")

delta_tbl

title: 175: Same, but different
text:
Load data


Code
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

equiv <- tibble::tribble(
  ~group, ~win, ~location, ~loser, ~score, ~wab,

  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Illinois", "Home", "Texas Tech", "81-77", 0.62,
  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Michigan St.", "Neutral", "North Carolina", "74-58", 0.62,
  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Vanderbilt", "Away", "UCF", "105-93", 0.63,
  
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Virginia Tech", "Home", "Virginia", "95-85 (3OT)", 0.61,
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Stanford", "Neutral", "St. Louis", "78-77", 0.60,
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "USC", "Away", "Minnesota", "70-69 (OT)", 0.60,
  
  "About +0.59 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Syracuse", "Home", "Tennessee", "62-60", 0.59,

  "About +0.59 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Youngstown St.", "Away", "Grand Canyon", "90-81", 0.59,
)


# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

Load data


Code
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

apl_data <- readr::read_csv("apl_data.csv")

overtime <- readr::read_csv("overtime.csv")

duke <- readr::read_csv("duke.csv")

# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}




Dumbbell plot


Code
highlight_teams <- c("Duke", "Michigan", "Florida", "Arizona",
                     "Illinois", "Houston", "Purdue", "Michigan St.",
                     "Iowa St.", "Connecticut")

plot_data <- apl_data |>
  dplyr::filter(Season == 2026, TeamName %in% highlight_teams) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    APL_Off = round(APL_Off, 1),
    APL_Def = round(APL_Def, 1)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(AdjEM)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    axis_label = sprintf(
      "<b>%s</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt; color:grey40'>%s / %s</span>",
      TeamName, RankAPL_Off, RankAPL_Def
    ),
    TeamName = forcats::fct_reorder(TeamName, AdjEM),
    team_chr = as.character(TeamName)
  )

logo_data <- plot_data

time_plot <- plot_data |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(y = TeamName)) +
  ggplot2::geom_segment(
    ggplot2::aes(x = APL_Def, xend = APL_Off, yend = TeamName, color = team_chr),
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(x = APL_Def, color = team_chr), size = 3) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(x = APL_Off, color = team_chr), size = 3) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(x = APL_Off, label = "O", color = team_chr),
    hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1.1, size = 4.6, fontface = "bold",
    family = "Roboto Condensed"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(x = APL_Def, label = "D", color = team_chr),
    hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1.8, size = 4.6, fontface = "bold",
    family = "Roboto Condensed"
  ) +
  cbbplotR::geom_cbb_teams(
    data = logo_data,
    ggplot2::aes(x = 14, y = TeamName, team = team_chr),
    width = 0.05
  ) +
  cbbplotR::scale_color_cbb_teams() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(
    labels = setNames(plot_data$axis_label, as.character(plot_data$TeamName))
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(15, 20, 1),
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(add = c(0.5, 0.5))
  ) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  ggplot2::annotation_custom(
    grid::textGrob(
      "D-I rank\nOffense / Defense",
      x = grid::unit(-0.06, "npc"),  # closer to panel left edge
      y = grid::unit(1.02, "npc"),   # just above top of panel
      hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0,
      gp = grid::gpar(
        fontsize = 8.5,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "#333333",
        fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed",
        lineheight = 0.9
      )
    )
  ) +
  hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Some teams play <em>fast</em> <br> Others let the <em>opponent</em> play fast",
    subtitle = "Average possession length in seconds on offense and defense<br>",
    x = "Seconds",
    y = "",
    caption = "Shows only top-10 teams at kenpom.com through March 4 games  \nViz by Chris at Bless your chart"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 20,
      family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 12.5,
      lineheight = 1.5,
      family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 30, 5, 40),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 12,
      family = "Roboto Condensed",
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(
      size = 10,
      family = "Roboto Condensed",
      hjust = 0.5,
      lineheight = 1.3
    ),
    plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "plain",
      size = 10,
      family = "Roboto Condensed"
    )
  )


ggplot2::ggsave("time_plot.png",
                time_plot,
                h = 9,
                w = 7.5,
                dpi = 600,
                bg = "white",
                type = "cairo")

time_plot











Duke tempo plot


Code
duke_facet <- overtime |>
  dplyr::filter(TeamName == "Duke") |>
  dplyr::mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(AdjTempo, AdjEM),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric = dplyr::recode(metric,
      "AdjTempo" = "Adjusted Tempo",
      "AdjEM"    = "Adjusted Efficiency Margin"
    )
  )

duke_plot <- duke_facet |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = value)) +
  ggplot2::geom_smooth(
    method = "loess", span = 0.5, se = FALSE, color = "#003087"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%B"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(
    ~ metric,
    scales = "free_y",
    ncol = 1
  ) +
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(
    y = list(
      metric == "Adjusted Tempo" ~ ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
        limits = c(64, 72),
        breaks = seq(64, 72, 2)
      ),
      metric == "Adjusted Efficiency Margin" ~ ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
        limits = c(25, 45),
        breaks = seq(25, 45, 5)
      )
    )
  ) +
  hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Duke is playing more <em>efficient</em> and  more <em>deliberate</em>",
    subtitle = "How Duke's adjusted efficiency margin and adjusted tempo have changed this season. <br>As of March 4, Duke ranks <b>1st in the country</b> in kenpom efficiency margin and <b>287th</b> in adjusted tempo.",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    caption = "Data via kenpom.com through March 4 games\nViz by Chris at Bless your chart"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5, size = 20, family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(
      hjust = 0.5, size = 12.5, lineheight = 1.5, family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 11, family = "Roboto Condensed", face = "bold"
    ),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 30, 5, 40),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 10, family = "Roboto Condensed", face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 10, family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "plain", size = 10, family = "Roboto Condensed"
    )
  )

ggplot2::ggsave("duke_plot.png",
                duke_plot,
                w = 8,
                h = 8,
                dpi = 600,
                bg = "white",
                type = "cairo")
duke_plot











Game one: possession plot


Code
# set teams
away_team <- "Duke"
home_team <- "North Carolina"
home_col <- "#56a0d3"
away_col <- "#012169"


# schedule <- bigballR::get_team_schedule(season = "2025-26", team.name = "North Carolina")


# Get play by play for all games played so far in season
# duke <- bigballR::get_play_by_play(schedule$Game_ID[23])

no_fts <- duke |>
  dplyr::filter(
    Event_Type %in% c(
      "Two Point Jumper",
      "Three Point Jumper",
      "Layup",
      "Dunk",
      "Hook",
      "Tip Shot",
      "Turnover"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    scoring = dplyr::case_match(Event_Result, "made" ~ TRUE, "missed" ~ FALSE, NA ~ FALSE),
    pts_value = dplyr::case_when(
      Event_Type == "Turnover" ~ -1,
      Event_Result == "missed" & Shot_Value %in% c(2, 3) ~ 0,
      Event_Result == "made" & Shot_Value == 2 ~ 2,
      Event_Result == "made" & Shot_Value == 3 ~ 3,
      .default = 0
    )
  )

# handle fts separately
fts <- duke |>
  dplyr::filter(Event_Type == "Free Throw") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    scoring = dplyr::case_match(Event_Result, "made" ~ TRUE, "missed" ~ FALSE, NA ~ FALSE),
    pts_value = dplyr::case_when(
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of1") ~ 1,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of2") ~ 1,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of2")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of2") &
          Event_Result == "made"
      ) ~ 2,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of2")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of2") &
          Event_Result == "missed"
      ) ~ 1,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of3") ~ 1,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of3")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of3") &
          Event_Result == "made"
      ) ~ 2,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of3")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "1of3") &
          Event_Result == "missed"
      ) ~ 1,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "3of3")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of3") &
          Event_Result == "made"
      ) ~ 3,
      Event_Result == "made" &
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "3of3")
      & dplyr::lag(
        stringr::str_detect(Event_Description, "2of3") &
          Event_Result == "missed"
      ) ~ 2,
      Event_Result == "missed" & Shot_Value == 1 ~ 0
    )
  )

game_plot <- no_fts |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(fts) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Game_Seconds) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    Event_Type %in% c(
      "Two Point Jumper",
      "Three Point Jumper",
      "Layup",
      "Dunk",
      "Hook",
      "Tip Shot",
      "Free Throw",
      "Turnover"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    scoring_type = dplyr::case_when(
      Event_Type == "Turnover" ~ "turnover",
      Event_Type == "Free Throw" & scoring == TRUE ~ "free_throw",
      Event_Type == "Free Throw" & scoring == FALSE ~ "miss_ft",
      Shot_Value == 2 & scoring == TRUE ~ "two_pointer",
      Shot_Value == 3 & scoring == TRUE ~ "three_pointer",
      scoring == FALSE & Shot_Value == 2 ~ "miss_2",
      scoring == FALSE & Shot_Value == 3 ~ "miss_3",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    pts_shape = dplyr::case_when(
      scoring_type == "turnover"      ~ 4L,
      scoring_type == "miss_ft"       ~ 49L,
      scoring_type == "miss_2"        ~ 50L,
      scoring_type == "miss_3"        ~ 51L,
      scoring_type == "free_throw"    ~ 49L,
      scoring_type == "two_pointer"   ~ 50L,
      scoring_type == "three_pointer" ~ 51L,
      TRUE                            ~ 45L
    ),
    display_size = dplyr::case_when(
      scoring_type == "turnover"      ~ 2.5,
      scoring_type == "miss_ft"       ~ 2,
      scoring_type == "miss_2"        ~ 2.5,
      scoring_type == "miss_3"        ~ 2.5,
      scoring_type == "free_throw"    ~ 3,
      scoring_type == "two_pointer"   ~ 3.5,
      scoring_type == "three_pointer" ~ 4,
      TRUE                            ~ 2
    ),
    y_nudge = dplyr::case_when(
      scoring_type == "three_pointer" ~ 0.16,
      scoring_type == "two_pointer"   ~ 0.13,
      scoring_type == "free_throw"    ~ 0.10,
      scoring_type %in% c("miss_2", "miss_3", "miss_ft") ~ -0.10,
      scoring_type == "turnover"      ~ -0.16,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(scoring_type))

score_diff_overlay <- game_plot |>
  dplyr::select(Game_Seconds, Away_Score, Home_Score) |>
  dplyr::distinct() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    score_diff = Away_Score - Home_Score,
    max_diff = max(abs(score_diff)),
    # Flip the sign so ribbon goes DOWN when away (Duke) leads
    diff_scaled = 1.5 - (score_diff / max_diff * 0.25)
  )

max_unc_lead <- score_diff_overlay |>
  dplyr::filter(score_diff == max(score_diff)) |>
  dplyr::slice(1)

max_duke_lead <- score_diff_overlay |>
  dplyr::filter(score_diff == min(score_diff)) |>
  dplyr::slice(1)

game_plot |>
  ggplot2::ggplot(
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = Game_Seconds,
      y = as.numeric(factor(Poss_Team)) + y_nudge,
      color = scoring_type,
      size = display_size
    )
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(shape = pts_shape)) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_identity() +
  ggplot2::scale_size_identity() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq_along(sort(unique(
    game_plot$Poss_Team
  ))), labels = sort(unique(game_plot$Poss_Team))) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "free_throw"    = "#2E8B57",
      "two_pointer"   = "#006400",
      "three_pointer" = "#004225",
      "miss_ft"       = "#cc0000",
      "miss_2"        = "#cc0000",
      "miss_3"        = "#cc0000",
      "turnover"      = "#cc0000"
    )
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 600, 1200, 1800, 2400),
    labels = c("1 minute", "10 minutes", "Halftime", "30 Minutes", "40 minutes")
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1200,
                      linetype = "dashed",
                      color = "#333333") +
  ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = cbbplotR::element_cbb_teams(size = 0.9),
    panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown()
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Possessions",
    y = "",
    title = "North Carolina 71, Duke 68",
    subtitle = "Scoring possessions shown in different shades of green: <span style='color:#2E8B57'>free throw trips</span>, <span style='color:#006400'>two-pointers</span>, <span style='color:#004225'>three-pointers</span><br>Empty possessions shown in red: <span style='color:#CC0000'>missed shots</span> or <span style='color:#CC0000'>turnovers (x)</span>",
    caption = "data via bigballR + logos via cbbplotR | February 7, 2026 \nTable by Chris at Bless your Chart"
  ) +
